reviews.comment:
Desmejorado. Bar cerrado, en ocasiones falta lubricante, combustible o no funciona aire ... Flojo, las estaciones ACA y lo digo como socio muchas veces se llevan el premio a las peores del condado.

(Translated by Google)
Deteriorated. Bar closed, sometimes they're out of lubricant, fuel, or the air conditioning doesn't work... Poor, ACA stations—and I say this as a member—often take the prize for the worst in the county.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxal82TXlBRRAB
